New version 1.8 is released. Please commit attached patch instead of
original one.

Regards.

---
Yasuhiro KIMURA

----Next_Part(Mon_Sep__1_11_49_49_2008_199)--

Index: Makefile
===================================================================

retrieving revision 1.43
diff -u -r1.43 Makefile
--- Makefile	15 Aug 2008 04:22:17 -0000	1.43
+++ Makefile	1 Sep 2008 02:40:31 -0000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	noscript
-PORTVERSION=	1.7.8
+PORTVERSION=	1.8
 DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	-fx+mz+sm
 CATEGORIES=	www
